hotel_name: Tru by Hilton Nam Định City Centre (Tru by Hilton Nam Dinh City Centre)

reviews.title: Hotel's paid laundry service
reviews.text: Now that the hotel has been acquired by Hilton, laundry services require a fee, which is not a problem. However, something happened last night that I couldn't accept. I paid *** Vietnamese dong and put my clothes in the washing machine, then went out for dinner. When I returned, my clothes hadn't been washed at all; someone had taken them out of the washing machine for no reason. What made me even angrier was that the front desk staff just kept saying sorry when I asked them to check the surveillance. I had to put my clothes in another drum to wash them again. After washing, when I went to put my clothes in the drying drum, I found a pair of panties that didn't belong to me inside! I am very angry; such management does not deserve a star-rated service. I have stayed at this hotel several times before and had a pleasant experience, but this time I am really disappointed! I hope customer opinions can be taken seriously.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Jacky,
Greetings from Tru by Hilton Nam Dinh City Centre! 
On behalf of the team, I’d like to thank you for your sharing your feedback.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience experienced during your stay. Please know this is not reflective of our usual standards. I would appreciate the opportunity to connect directly to discuss further.

Thank you for being a Hilton Honors Member! 
We hope to hear from you soon! 
Tru-ly regards,
Thuy/ Tran
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Nam Dinh City Centre

reviews.text: The hotel is centrally located but operates in a shared space with residents, and the reception is on a higher floor rather than the ground floor. The hotel severely lacks parking space :(

reviews.title: Bon séjour
reviews.positives: Style moderne de l hôtel

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
The hotel is located in the city center, making it very convenient to access various places. There are many good restaurants around. The room space has an unusual design with a panoramic view of the city. 
Feedback: The hotel is slightly lacking in staff.
The room space has a rather minimalist design, so there is no wardrobe; clothes are hung in one corner.

Tru by Hilton Nam Dinh City Centre

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.positives: Chambre très grande, propre et confortable. Le lit est immense et très confortable également. Très belle vue depuis la chambre. Le système de laverie est très pratique. Le petit déjeuner est très simple mais bon. Je recommande cet hôtel.
reviews.negatives: Nous avions commandé des rouleaux de printemps végétariens puisque le menu les proposaient mais ils les ont servis avec de la viande dedans. Quand nous avons fait remarqué, le chef a simplement déroulé, retiré les morceaux et nous a renvoyé le plat, et il n'avait même pas retiré tous les morceaux... Cela n'est pas très respectueux. Le plat avait de toute façon été en contact avec de la viande donc la personne végétarienne n'a pas pu manger. Nous avons du aussi attendre 50min pour être servis. Peut être juste éviter de manger sur place car le reste est parfait.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is clean and beautiful, breakfast is good, but the surrounding area is not bustling, making it difficult to catch a taxi.

reviews.title: Zu modern - eher for Jugendliche
reviews.positives: Die Zimmer sind neu und modern, Lage ist sehr zentral
reviews.negatives: Der Preis ist hoch, die Zimmer sind klein. Hier will man zu modern/jugendlich sein. Weniger ist mehr - man fühlt sich nicht heimisch, es ist nicht gemütlich. Wir hatten dann noch eine sehr laute Klimaanlage und waren krank (dafür kann das Hotel natürlich nichts)

reviews.title: Great Place with Personality
reviews.text:
Tru by Hilton in Nam Dinh is very well-known so I had high hopes. The rooms are smartly designed with optimized space, plenty of power outlets, a movable work desk, and a bright bathroom. The common areas are vibrant and spacious, catering to various needs such as working, dining, relaxing, and socializing.

The location is also very convenient, situated on a main road with easy access to transportation. The staff are friendly and professional. The only downside is that the breakfast selection is not very diverse.

reviews.title: Suitable for accommodation
reviews.text: I like the style of the hotel. The room is not too large but fully equipped, with a very reasonable and tidy layout that maximizes the 18m2 space without feeling cramped or stuffy. The large glass window next to the bed is a highlight rather than just a plus. If you are looking for a place to stay that serves the basic purpose of rest but is convenient and clean, then this is a very worthwhile option.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nhân viên thân thiện, tiện nghi khách sạn rất nhiều, phù hợp cho đi du lịch gia đình. Khách sạn sạch sẽ, mang phong cách Nhật Bản nên mọi thứ đều có sự đơn giản nhưng tiện nghi.
reviews.negatives: Khu vực để xe rất kém, không đáp ứng được nhu cầu của khách. Trước sảnh khách sản có chỗ để xe thì thường xuyên bị bảo vệ mời đi chỗ khác vì cho rằng ở đây có biển báo xe bus. Mặc dù khách hàng đỗ cách hơn 5m so với biển bảo này nhưng bảo vệ thường xuyên không cho đỗ. Không hiểu có mập mờ gì không.

Dear Jean,
Greetings from Tru by Hilton Nam Dinh City Centre!
On behalf of the team, I’d like to thank you for your wonderful feedback. We’re thrilled you enjoyed your stay at Tru by Hilton Nam Dinh City Centre. Your kind words inspire our team.
Thank you for being a Hilton Honors Member!
We hope to welcome you back soon!
Tru-ly regards,
Thuy Tran
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Nam Dinh City Centre

reviews.title: Sauber & Freundlicher Personal
reviews.text:
Ich kann das Hotel gern empfehlen. Zimmer ist sauber und hat moderne Ausstattung. 

Personal ist sehr freundlich.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Pokoj byl čistý. Hotel je situován přimo před tržnicí a v okolí je mnoho restaurací. Personál byl přátelský a vždy nápomocný.
reviews.negatives: I když jsme bydleli ve 11. patře byly ráno slyšet motorky. Bylo to trochu hlučné. Pokoj pro čtyři osoby je malý. Pro dvě osoby je pokoj ideálnější

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: There is a Tv But  ıts dosen't show any channels.No smart tv inside room.
reviews.response:
Dear Ibrahim,
Greetings from Tru by Hilton Nam Dinh City Centre! 
On behalf of the team, I’d like to thank you for your sharing your feedback.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience experienced during your stay. Please know this is not reflective of our usual standards. I would appreciate the opportunity to connect directly to discuss further.

Thank you for being a Hilton Honors Member! 
We hope to hear from you soon! 
Tru-ly regards,
Thuy/ Tran
Guest Operations Manager
Tru by Hilton Nam Dinh City Centre

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Temiz ve konforlu

reviews.title: 非常好的服務
reviews.text: 這次住宿一切都很好喔！尤其我要讚揚 THUY，非常好的服務，耐心的說明設施，每天微笑的打招呼，還有一位戴眼鏡的先生，幫忙叫taxi ，還帶我們到一樓跟司機說明位置，住宿體驗真的很棒！

reviews.room_type: King Guest Room with Sofa Bed

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Rooms are very compact & bathroom is very small. Hot water cattle with tea & coffee were missing. Good for solo traveler but not comfortable for two people.
reviews.negatives: Location

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The hotel is in the center of city, very convenient and the rooms are quiet which is rare in Vietnam. The beds were very comfortable
reviews.negatives: the staff was not friendly and didn´t understand English very well, instead of clarification, they tell you to go away.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: Good! Great city view. I really enjoy the sunrise and even nightlight!
reviews.negatives: Don't provide the drier inside the room!

reviews.title: 1N stay in Nam Dinh
reviews.positives:
Clean rooms. 

For 2 pax - If you like a more spacious room and bed, i suggest to book the quadruple room to have a more comfortable stay.
reviews.negatives: Replace old towels. Not much of choice for the bfast.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Bed was delicious, location good, just pretty expensive for Vietnam standards
reviews.negatives: Price

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: clean, easy to access, friendly staff , all good

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The room was really nice, clean with a modern and sophisticated design, including a large windows which allows an exciting overwiew of the city.
reviews.negatives:
When we arrived (around 2pm) the 2 guys at the reception were not welcoming us at all. They replied shortly and seemed not to be interested besides the payment.
They did not explain us where to find our room and how to get there (as this was not intuitively clear für us) but just said "yes" to our wrong assumption where it is. It was definitely not the language barrier as we communicated in both, English and Vietnamese.
A friendly cleaning lady helped us out. 
Also the lady at the reception on the next day was nice and friendly - so perhaps we had just bad luck with the staff on arrival.

reviews.title: Great value for the price.
reviews.positives: Gym is really good. The room is very clean with a comfortable bed.

reviews.title: So good Sojo
reviews.positives: It is a modern and fun hotel with good layout for beds. The bedding was exceptionally comfortable. Location is perfect close to everything
reviews.negatives: The bathroom could be better setup. Not enough room to dry up. Otherwise it is great.

reviews.title: Recommended
reviews.positives: Attractive modern design. Quite unlike most Vietnamese hotels where I have stayed before; it reminded me more of a Japanese business hotel. Comfortable bed. Great city view. Good breakfast buffet that is well worth the additional 95.000 VND per person. Washing machine for guests.
reviews.negatives: The bar is nice, but the music too loud. No electric kettle in the room.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The self service kitchen and rooms

reviews.title: First it was Sojo, now it is Tru Hilton. A wonderful place to stay
reviews.positives: I liked the lady who remembered me from the previous visit. Was her name Thuy? I liked the willingness of staff to help me. I asked for assistance with laundry and the air-conditioning in my room. The help was given immediately and with good grace. If I had an issue it was resolved. Great service. The views from any window are magnificent.
reviews.negatives: It is not a dislike but it would be nice to have access to teabags or something similar.

reviews.title: Very clean
reviews.positives: Convenient and clean
reviews.negatives: Key only works for selected floor on elevator

reviews.title: Will stay again
reviews.positives:
Great location
Plenty of food nearby
reviews.negatives:
No reception downstairs
Have to travel to level 5

reviews.title: Great modern accomodation in Nam Dinh
reviews.positives: Modern and clean bedrooms that are well designed for how compact they are. We had 3 sleep in a room comfortably. Communal area which include lounge, washing and gym are useful and done well.
reviews.negatives: Windows are not openable but not really a problem for us.

reviews.title: So good
reviews.positives: All
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very nice clean and modern hotel. Great city view.Staff is very helpfull. I guess that in terms of price/quality it is the best option in Nam Dinh

reviews.title: Great value for the money
reviews.positives: Innovative approach to lodging, loved it

reviews.title: a comfortable hotel
reviews.positives: The staff were friendly and the hotel facilities were excellent. 👍👍

reviews.title: Excellent and highly recommended.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was good. Very basic continental breakfast.  Location was good. It was very close to all the places we went to. Staff was very helpful even though their english was not very good.Love the idear of having a kitchen where you can cook your  own food. We had a ver good stay and i would definitely recommend this hotel to everyone 👌
reviews.negatives: I think they just need to get at least one person that was fluent in english.
